lenses.generalist: Search all eight registered mechanisms and prefer the simplest full-prefix explanation.
lenses.differences: Prioritize finite differences, periodic differences, and lagged polynomial increments.
lenses.recurrences: Prioritize affine and second-order recurrences, including periodic phases and biases.
lenses.streams: Prioritize interleaved streams, lagged subsequences, and growing arithmetic blocks.
lenses.modular: Actively test modular affine structure and genuine wrap points, while rejecting forced modular stories.
lenses.simplicity: Prefer the shortest allowed complete mechanism and reject clever partial fits.
lenses.diversifier: Actively seek a materially different allowed mechanism from the leading explanation.
lenses.arithmetic: Prioritize exact arithmetic, signs, indexing, and replay of every visible term.
lenses.full_replay: Require a complete mechanism that replays the whole prefix before extrapolating.
lenses.classifier: First identify the most plausible mechanism family, then solve its parameters exactly.
lenses.minority: Examine coherent minority answers carefully and compare their full-prefix support with the plurality.
lenses.adversarial: Try to break attractive explanations with counterchecks, alternate indexing, and exact replay.
lenses.hypothesis: Maintain multiple concrete hypotheses until one uniquely survives full-prefix checking.
lenses.proof: Favor answers accompanied by a concise reproducible rule and a direct prefix check.
lenses.independent: Solve from scratch before considering any anonymous candidate evidence.
